title: Dungeons Water Plant
description: Replaces seagrass only at y=62 so that it looks like the water plant from Minecraft Dungeons.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

Using CTM, this resource pack replaces seagrass only at Y=62 so that it looks like the water plant from Minecraft Dungeons. Any seagrass placed above or found below this level will appear normal.

![Dependencies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/032b3169badbdce870ae6ae179be88f8150e0e9a_0.webp)

[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
